name: Naturepedia Water Systems Knowledge Mesh
description: Machine-readable semantic knowledge mesh connecting Weather™, Water Systems™, watersheds, groundwater, wetlands, rivers, floodplains, estuaries, coastal systems, ecological processes, and canonical Naturepedia resources.

hasPart.name: Weather → Water Relationship
hasPart.description: Atmospheric processes regulate precipitation, runoff, infiltration, recharge, and watershed dynamics.

hasPart.name: Hydrological Flow Network
hasPart.description: Precipitation, groundwater, rivers, wetlands, floodplains, estuaries, and coastal systems function as interconnected hydrological pathways.

hasPart.name: Watershed Connectivity
hasPart.description: Headwaters, tributaries, groundwater recharge, wetlands, and downstream estuaries operate as connected watershed systems.

hasPart.name: Ecological Connectivity
hasPart.description: Hydrological processes regulate habitat quality, biodiversity, nutrient cycling, and seasonal wildlife behavior.

hasPart.name: Earth Systems Integration
hasPart.description: Water Systems are interconnected with Weather™, Earth Systems™, ecosystems, geology, and climate processes throughout Naturepedia.
